name: India
description: The world's most populous nation and fastest-growing major economy, India pursues strategic autonomy — refusing alignment with either bloc while maintaining ties with all. Its QUAD membership signals Pacific alignment while Russian arms deals and Soviet-era ties persist. The BrahMos supersonic cruise missile system, a growing space program (ISRO), and a large IT sector provide both hard and soft power. Simultaneous nuclear-armed rivalries with China and Pakistan make every move a multi-front calculation.
